title: helianthemum supramontanum
intro: Helianthemum supramontanum, also known as Corsican rockrose, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae. This perennial plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and potentially alleviating stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum supramontanum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its potential medicinal properties.
